creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
(In reply to Steve Wills from comment #0)
From https://github.com/SSSD/sssd/releases/tag/sssd-2_4_0, the python27 bindings are removed by default.  The "easy" solution is to upgrade sssd from 1.11 to 2.4, and then revert those ports (like security/sudo) that removed sssd functionality ...
